allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total games: {len\(d[\\"games\\"]\)}'\); print\('Slugs:'\); [print\(g['slug']\) for g in d['games']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); g=d['games'][0]; print\(json.dumps\({k:g[k] for k in ['title','description','instructions','tags','category','developer']}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); games=d['games']; print\([g.get\('addedAt','NO_DATE'\) for g in games[:10]]\)")

Bash(node -e "const g = require\('./src/data/games.json'\); console.log\('Total games:', g.games.length\); const unity = g.games.filter\(x => x.embedUrl && x.embedUrl.includes\('gamemonetize'\)\); console.log\('GM games:', unity.length\);")
Bash(node -e "const g = require\('./src/data/games.json'\); const game = g.games.find\(x => x.slug === 'bullet-man-master-3d'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(game, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const g = require\('./src/data/games.json'\); const game = g.games.find\(x => x.slug === 'bullet-man-master-3d'\); console.log\('Found:', !!game\); console.log\('hasAdSdk field:', game?.hasAdSdk\);")

Bash(node -e "const g = require\('./src/data/games.json'\); const cats = {}; g.games.forEach\(x => { cats[x.category] = \(cats[x.category]||[]\); cats[x.category].push\(x.slug\); }\); Object.entries\(cats\).forEach\(\([c,s]\) => console.log\(c, s.length, s.slice\(0,3\).join\(', '\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const g = require\('./src/data/games.json'\); const featured = g.games.filter\(x => x.featured\).map\(x => x.slug\); console.log\('Featured:', featured.join\(', '\)\); const topAction = g.games.filter\(x=>x.category==='action'\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b.plays-a.plays\).slice\(0,8\).map\(x=>x.slug\); console.log\('Top action:', topAction.join\(', '\)\); const topPuzzle = g.games.filter\(x=>x.category==='puzzle'\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b.plays-a.plays\).slice\(0,8\).map\(x=>x.slug\); console.log\('Top puzzle:', topPuzzle.join\(', '\)\); const topCasual = g.games.filter\(x=>x.category==='casual'\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b.plays-a.plays\).slice\(0,8\).map\(x=>x.slug\); console.log\('Top casual:', topCasual.join\(', '\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const g = require\('./src/data/games.json'\); g.games.filter\(x => x.embedType === 'self-hosted' || x.embedType === 'other'\).forEach\(x => console.log\(x.slug, x.embedType, x.embedUrl\)\)")
